name: The Sirens (Girl Rock Band)
description: Three piece girl hard rock band made up of three sisters: Dany: 24, blonde, frontwoman, lead guitar and lead vocals; Pau, 22, drummer, backing and lead vocals; Ale, 19, bass guitar, piano and backing vocals. They originate from Mexico and are bilingual, speaking both English and Spanish. They grew up in Monterrey, Mexico. They've been on the road touring for quite a while.
creator: dbryson
